MCR-2026-001.why_it_matched: Rear extension roof alterations and new rooflights are a useful roofing opportunity.
MCR-2026-001.suggested_next_action: Open the planning page, confirm the rooflight and roof alteration details, then send a short roofing introduction.

MCR-2026-002.why_it_matched: Loft conversion and rear dormer roof extension are a strong roofing fit.
MCR-2026-002.suggested_next_action: Open the planning documents, check the roof scope, then call or send a short letter if the project is active.

MCR-2026-003.why_it_matched: Replacement slate roof covering and chimney repairs match roofing repair work.
MCR-2026-003.suggested_next_action: Check the planning documents for roof material details, then approach with relevant slate and chimney repair experience.

MCR-2026-006.why_it_matched: Roof-mounted solar panels may need roof condition checks or roofing coordination.
MCR-2026-006.suggested_next_action: Review whether the roof covering is affected, then offer a roof inspection before panel installation.

MCR-2026-008.why_it_matched: The pitched roof kitchen extension has some roofing relevance but the refusal lowers priority.
MCR-2026-008.suggested_next_action: Monitor for a revised application before spending time on direct outreach.
